title: Design a RESTful API for a Blog
input_format: HTTP requests with method, path, headers, and optional JSON body
output_format: JSON responses with appropriate status codes, headers, and body
constraints: Must support CRUD operations for posts and comments. Must follow REST conventions. Must handle errors with proper HTTP status codes.
function_signature: class BlogAPI { createPost(req, res): void; getPost(req, res): void; updatePost(req, res): void; deletePost(req, res): void; listPosts(req, res): void; addComment(req, res): void; }
